note: PLACEHOLDER THRESHOLDS — NOT CLINICALLY VALIDATED (issue #22, docs/clinical-review/2026-07-02-minimum-evidence-gate.md). Below these floors of answered SCORED questions the engine emits the 'not enough information yet' state instead of a domain level / support estimate / recommendation tier — established screeners (e.g. M-CHAT-R) emit no score until the instrument is complete. Red-flag rules are EXEMPT and always evaluated on raw answers (CLAUDE.md §2 rule 8). Values exist only so the gate mechanism is real and testable; a clinical advisor must set them (possibly per age band) before release, same precedent as the placeholder scoring weights.
